Metals & Mining

Keep your mills running and mines dewatered

Monitor hot strip mills, runout tables, crushers, conveyors, and dewatering pumps from the motor control cabinet. Detect failures weeks to months before they stop production.

800%
ROI at Nyrstar in 11 months
27
Failures detected at ArcelorMittal
€650k
Downtime costs prevented
Request a demo See results below
Trusted by leaders in metals and steel
ArcelorMittal Nyrstar NLMK Salzgitter
The challenge

Every hour of downtime costs six figures

Steel mills run 24/7 and mines cannot stop dewatering. When a roller bearing fails or a borehole pump seizes, you face hours of lost production.

Hot strip mill reliability
Runout table rollers, cardan shafts, and mill motors operate under extreme stress. SAM4 detects bearing wear, coupling degradation, and electrical faults across the full drivetrain.
Submerged dewatering pumps
Borehole pumps sit 150-180 metres deep. Pulling one for walk-down costs thousands and takes days. SAM4 monitors from the MCC without a crane.
Conveyor and crusher uptime
Material flow depends on conveyors and crushers running continuously. SAM4 detects belt degradation, bearing failure, and motor faults before they halt production.
High motor replacement costs
A medium voltage mill motor can cost €50-200K to replace. SAM4 gives weeks of advance warning so you can plan the change-out during scheduled downtime.
What we monitor

Critical assets in metals and mining

SAM4 monitors any AC motor-driven equipment from the motor control cabinet.

Crushers & mills
Ball mills, SAG mills, and crushers with bearing, gearbox, and motor fault detection. Prevents costly production stops.
Mill monitoring details →
Conveyors
Belt conveyors and material handling systems with belt degradation alerts and drive system monitoring.
Conveyor monitoring details →
Pumps
Dewatering pumps, cooling water pumps, and process pumps. SAM4 detects bearing degradation, cavitation, and efficiency loss.
Pump monitoring details →
Proof

Metals and mining case studies

Featured

ArcelorMittal: 27 failures detected, €650k prevented

SAM4 monitors critical drivetrain assets across ArcelorMittal steel operations. Including hot strip mill rollers, overhead cranes, and process pumps. Over a 12-month deployment, the system detected 27 developing faults before they caused unplanned stops.

27
Failures detected
€650k
Downtime prevented
5 months
Maximum advance warning

Nyrstar
ROI achieved within 11 months of deployment at a zinc refining operation.
Read case study →
€50K+
ArcelorMittal
Saved from a single early bearing detection on a critical cooling water pump at a blast furnace. Five months advance warning.
Read case study →
Installation

No sensors on the asset

1
Clip on at the MCC SAM4 installs on the power cable inside the motor control cabinet. No asset shutdown. No crane.
2
Connect to the network Cellular gateway sends data to the cloud. No plant network integration needed for deployment.
3
Monitor from anywhere The SAM4 dashboard shows asset health, fault alerts, and energy performance within hours.
SAM4 installation at the MCC

The invisible pain points become visible.

Patrick Emmers, Nyrstar
Get started

From your first motor to every site

Start with a pilot on your highest-risk assets. Scale to full fleet monitoring as results prove out.
